productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Bold Red White Checked Shirt
description: Composition100% cotton shirt with short sleeves, has bold checks in red on a base of white, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, zipper pocket on left chest with appliquéd graphiti, and full length buttoned placket FittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this bold checked shirt from highlander. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day, while you hang out with your friends. The zippered pocket adds to it a sense of street fashion, creating a new style statement. This shirt can be teamed with jeans or chinos and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
